# Consent Checklist

## Classification Review

- Is every tracker or storage mechanism inventoried?
- Is each item mapped to a user-understandable purpose?
- Are essential and optional uses clearly separated?

## UX Review

- Can users refuse as easily as they accept?
- Are optional scripts blocked before consent?
- Can users change preferences later without friction?

## Policy Review

- Does the policy reflect the actual tracker inventory?
- Are third-party tools and purposes documented?
- Are consent records and configuration versions retained appropriately?
